title: PaxStressia events file (rules/events.json)
description: Deck-driven events per DESIGN.md §10: historically sourced, weighted by world state, every event a choice with a legitimacy-triangle trade. `requires` predicates gate availability; `weight` sets draw odds among eligible cards.

severity.description: suppress_clock op (v0.6): scale of the hidden scandal; a leak applies this across all three gauges, multiplied.

node.description: Optional explicit node target; defaults to the event's drawn context node.

faction.description: presence op: which faction to seed/boost.

strength.description: presence op: strength added (floor-seeded if absent).

text.description: Dossier-tone briefing text (§2 tone). Civilian harm abstracted, never gore.

once.description: Historical beats fire at most once per run.

min_exposure.description: Eligible once any regime's Exposure (the §20 documentation track the player funds) reaches this level — the 'world notices' cards. Passive never funds research, so these never fire unprompted (calibration-safe).

country_collapsed.description: Eligible only after this country collapsed.

country_not_collapsed.description: Eligible only while this country stands.

min_collapsed.description: Eligible once at least N countries have collapsed.

min_links.description: Eligible once the faction graph holds at least N links.

requires_fired.description: Narrative chain (§20.2): eligible only once the named event id has already fired.
